scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/vue-app" "npm run dev -w apps/react-app" "npm run dev -w apps/shell"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/vue-app && npm run build -w apps/react-app && npm run build -w apps/shell
scripts.preview: concurrently "npm run preview -w apps/vue-app" "npm run preview -w apps/react-app" "npm run preview -w apps/shell"
